title: chavica retrofracta
intro: Chavica retrofracta, also known as the "wild coffee", is a shrub native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its high concentration of alkaloids and caffeine. The health benefits of Chavica retrofracta include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. Chavica retrofracta is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be found in various herbal supplements and preparations, including capsules and tinctures.
